title: McCormick Declares $0.39 Quarterly Dividend
text: HUNT VALLEY, Md., Sept. 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.39 per share on its common stocks, payable October 24, 2023 to shareholders of record October 10, 2023.

title: What Awaits McCormick (MKC) as It Queues for Q3 Earnings?
text: McCormick's (MKC) third-quarter results are likely to reflect the impacts of cost inflation and high SG&A costs. However, a focus on the CCI and GOE programs bodes well.

title: Earnings Preview: McCormick (MKC) Q3 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: McCormick (MKC) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: KBRA Releases Rating Report for Metropolitan Pier and Exposition Authority (Illinois) McCormick Place Expansion Project Refunding Bonds, Series 2023A and 2023B
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #KBRA--On September 20, 2023, KBRA assigned a long-term rating of AA- to the Metropolitan Pier and Exposition Authority (Illinois) McCormick Place Expansion Project Refunding Bonds, Series 2023A and McCormick Place Expansion Project Refunding Bonds, Series 2023B. KBRA additionally affirmed the AA- rating for parity bonds. The outlook remains Stable. To access rating and relevant documents, click here. Click here to view the report. title: 3 Inflation-Proof Consumer Staples Stocks Worth a Watch Now
text: Continuous inflationary pressure calls for watching closely stocks such as Mondelez International (MDLZ), Hershey (HSY), and McCormick & Company (MKC) as they provide a natural hedge against inflation.

title: McCormick (MKC) Looks Tempting: Up More Than 10% in 6 Months
text: McCormick (MKC) benefits from brand strength, prudent acquisitions and efficient saving programs. Solid marketing and innovative initiatives have been working well.

title: McCormick & Company, Incorporated to Report 2023 Third Quarter Financial Results on October 3, 2023
text: HUNT VALLEY, Md. , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE: MKC), a global leader in flavor, is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast of its third quarter 2023 financial results on Tuesday, October 3, 2023, at 8:00 a.m.
